name: matters
description: Give Codex one bounded information map for current Matters, history, predictions, corrections, and durable AI feedback.

interface.shortDescription: Understand current situations and leave durable clues
interface.longDescription: Use one bounded AI information map to understand a person's current Matters, history, gaps, World Model predictions, corrections, and pending observations without exposing raw private storage or creating a second truth owner.
defaultPrompt: Use Matters to explain what is happening now.
Check a Matter prediction against what happened.
Record this new user observation for later maintenance.
